659 GG0170D1_STTG_STNDG_STRT_CD GG0170D1_STTG_STNDG_STRT_CD GG0170D1 Mobility: Sitting to Standing Ability at Start of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to move to a standing position from a sitting position in a chair or on the side of
the bed at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate
